Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Jaran]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — Jaran has a scar at the corner of his lip.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — Jaran uses a cane.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — Jaran is Lindon's father.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — Jaran was once one of the most promising sacred artists in the clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 10''' — Jaran is watching a battle between Markuth and the Jades in Lindon's dream.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 12''' — Jaran watched the arena match in fury.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — Jaran is Wei Shi Jaran.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Jaran is juggling his cane.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Jaran has a wounded leg.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon restored Jaran’s eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon repaired the shape of Jaran’s long-twisted leg.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Jaran suspected Lindon caused the current situation.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Jaran has replacement eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Jaran is Kelsa's father.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — Jaran is part of Lindon's family.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
